item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n08","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed direct and supported the requested upstream redesign: it proposed freezing page patches, creating a unified after-sales rules entry, structuring the rule center, and giving an implementation sequence. It did not fire triage, stop to diagnose the pattern, or over-methodize the request."}
